endpoints.label: Analysis Detail
Investigation + Systems + Notes + Analyses
endpoints.query:
tech_recon.py show-investigation --id :id
tech_recon.py list-systems --investigation :id
tech_recon.py list-notes --subject-id :id
tech_recon.py list-analyses --investigation :id

endpoints.label: System + Artifacts + Notes
endpoints.query:
tech_recon.py show-system --id :id
tech_recon.py list-artifacts --system :id
tech_recon.py list-notes --subject-id :id

endpoints.label: Artifact
